diagnosis: Fit for duty — all vitals within normal parameters
notes: Quarterly fitness evaluation passed. Bone density stable despite extended zero-g exposure.

diagnosis: Minor plasma burn on left forearm
treatment: Applied NanoHeal-X7 dermal patch, regenerative therapy session
notes: Injury sustained during reactor maintenance. Full recovery expected within 48 hours.

treatment: Administered XenoShield-9 broad-spectrum vaccine and RadiShield booster
notes: Standard pre-EVA immunization course. No adverse reactions observed.

diagnosis: Mild adjustment disorder — homesickness and sleep disruption
treatment: Cognitive behavioral therapy sessions scheduled, NeuroCalm-3 prescribed for sleep
notes: First deep-space deployment. Recommend weekly check-ins for the next month.

treatment: RadiShield Compound infusion, 24-hour monitoring in medbay
notes: Radiation levels 15% above annual threshold. Restricted from high-rad zones for 30 days.

diagnosis: Fit for duty — slight decrease in cardiovascular endurance
notes: Cardio metrics 8% below baseline. Prescribed supplemental exercise program.

diagnosis: Acute decompression syndrome — EVA suit micro-breach
treatment: Hyperbaric chamber treatment, CryoStim injection, 48-hour observation
notes: Patient stabilized after emergency treatment. Suit breach traced to micro-meteorite impact.

diagnosis: Fit for duty — all metrics nominal
notes: Routine quarterly checkup. Excellent adaptation to station gravity.

diagnosis: Lab chemical exposure — mild respiratory irritation
